prompt: ช่วยคิด prompt สำหรับสร้าง landing page ให้หน่อย จะใช้ Claude สร้าง

assertions.text: Questions cover key dimensions: target audience, product/service, visual style, tech stack, content needs
Final improved prompt is self-contained — usable without the discovery summary
Output includes a Discovery Summary with Goal, Direction, Reference, Context, and Criteria
Improved prompt includes specific details (audience, style, features) — not generic template
